name: rielflow-workspace
description: TypeScript/Bun workflow runtime for cooperative multi-agent execution

scripts.build:server: bun build packages/rielflow/src/bin.ts --outfile dist/main.js --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow/src/index.ts --outfile dist/lib.js --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow-core/src/index.ts --outfile packages/rielflow-core/dist/core-runtime.js --target bun --minify --external rielflow-addons && bun build packages/rielflow-core/src/authored-node.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/authored-workflow.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/json-schema.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/node-template-fields.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/paths.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/prompt-template-context.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/prompt-template-file.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/render.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/runtime-prompt-assets.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/workflow-bundle-input.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/workflow-model.ts packages/rielflow-core/src/workflow-validation.ts --outdir packages/rielflow-core/dist --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow-addons/src/index.ts --outfile packages/rielflow-addons/dist/index.js --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow-adapters/src/index.ts --outfile packages/rielflow-adapters/dist/index.js --target bun --external rielflow-core && bun build packages/rielflow-events/src/index.ts packages/rielflow-events/src/path-resolution.ts packages/rielflow-events/src/runtime-ports.ts packages/rielflow-events/src/types.ts --outdir packages/rielflow-events/dist --target bun --external rielflow-core && bun build packages/rielflow-graphql/src/index.ts packages/rielflow-graphql/src/control-plane-service.ts packages/rielflow-graphql/src/dto.ts packages/rielflow-graphql/src/schema-contract.ts --outdir packages/rielflow-graphql/dist --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow-server/src/index.ts packages/rielflow-server/src/contracts.ts packages/rielflow-server/src/browser-overview.ts --outdir packages/rielflow-server/dist --target bun && for entry in index config context detect-vendor dispatch handler parse recorder-contracts redaction types; do bun build packages/rielflow-hook/src/$entry.ts --outfile packages/rielflow-hook/dist/$entry.js --target bun --external rielflow-core; done && rm -rf packages/rielflow-hook/dist/packages && bun build packages/rielflow/src/index.ts --outfile packages/rielflow/dist/lib.js --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow/src/cli.ts --outfile packages/rielflow/dist/cli.js --target bun && bun build packages/rielflow/src/bin.ts --outfile packages/rielflow/dist/main.js --target bun && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && bun run scripts/sync-package-declarations.ts && rm -rf dist/prompts packages/rielflow/dist/prompts packages/rielflow-core/dist/prompts packages/rielflow-addons/dist/prompts && cp -R packages/rielflow/src/workflow/prompts dist/prompts && cp -R packages/rielflow/src/workflow/prompts packages/rielflow/dist/prompts && cp -R packages/rielflow/src/workflow/prompts packages/rielflow-core/dist/prompts && cp -R packages/rielflow/src/workflow/prompts packages/rielflow-addons/dist/prompts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run typecheck
